list.name: car
list.label: Car
list.query: SELECT COALESCE(display_name, CONCAT('Car ',id)) AS __text, id AS __value FROM cars

targets.rawSql: SELECT StartDate AS "time", state FROM state WHERE CarID=$car AND $__timeFilter(StartDate) ORDER BY StartDate
SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(Datum,$__interval), avg(battery_level) AS "SoC" FROM pos WHERE CarID=$car AND $__timeFilter(Datum) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Range degradation (ideal range at >80% SoC, daily max)

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(Datum,'1d'), max(ideal_battery_range_km) AS "Ideal range" FROM pos WHERE CarID=$car AND battery_level>80 AND $__timeFilter(Datum) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1
SELECT lat, lng FROM pos WHERE CarID=$car AND $__timeFilter(Datum) AND lat IS NOT NULL AND lng IS NOT NULL AND lat<>0 AND lng<>0 ORDER BY id

SELECT ROUND(p.lat,4) AS lat, ROUND(p.lng,4) AS lng, 'Parked' AS kind, COUNT(*) AS visits, MAX(s.StartDate) AS last_seen FROM state s JOIN pos p ON p.id=s.StartPos WHERE s.CarID=$car AND $__timeFilter(s.StartDate) AND p.lat IS NOT NULL AND p.lng IS NOT NULL AND p.lat<>0 AND p.lng<>0 GROUP BY 1,2 ORDER BY last_seen DESC LIMIT 200

SELECT ROUND(p.lat,4) AS lat, ROUND(p.lng,4) AS lng, CASE WHEN COALESCE(cs.fast_charger_type,'')<>'' THEN 'SC' ELSE 'AC' END AS kind, COUNT(*) AS visits, MAX(cs.StartDate) AS last_seen FROM chargingstate cs JOIN pos p ON p.id=cs.Pos WHERE cs.CarID=$car AND $__timeFilter(cs.StartDate) AND p.lat IS NOT NULL AND p.lng IS NOT NULL AND p.lat<>0 AND p.lng<>0 GROUP BY 1,2,3 ORDER BY last_seen DESC LIMIT 100
SELECT COALESCE(fast_charger_type,'AC') AS metric, COUNT(*) AS value FROM chargingstate WHERE CarID=$car AND EndDate IS NOT NULL AND $__timeFilter(StartDate) GROUP BY 1

SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(d.StartDate,'1d'), SUM(ep.odometer-sp.odometer) AS "km" FROM drivestate d JOIN pos sp ON sp.id=d.StartPos JOIN pos ep ON ep.id=d.EndPos WHERE d.CarID=$car AND d.EndDate IS NOT NULL AND $__timeFilter(d.StartDate) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1
SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(StartDate,'1d'), SUM(charge_energy_added) AS "kWh" FROM chargingstate WHERE CarID=$car AND EndDate IS NOT NULL AND $__timeFilter(StartDate) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT d.StartDate AS 'Start', ROUND(ep.odometer-sp.odometer,1) AS 'km', TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE,d.StartDate,d.EndDate) AS 'min', d.speed_max AS 'max km/h', d.power_max AS 'kW max' FROM drivestate d JOIN pos sp ON sp.id=d.StartPos JOIN pos ep ON ep.id=d.EndPos WHERE d.CarID=$car AND d.EndDate IS NOT NULL AND $__timeFilter(d.StartDate) ORDER BY d.StartDate DESC LIMIT 200

SELECT StartDate AS 'Start', ROUND(charge_energy_added,1) AS 'kWh', max_charger_power AS 'kW', COALESCE(fast_charger_type,'AC') AS 'Type' FROM chargingstate WHERE CarID=$car AND EndDate IS NOT NULL AND $__timeFilter(StartDate) ORDER BY StartDate DESC LIMIT 200
